titleStmt.title: SII 6.1184: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1184. (A.R. No. 365-XVII of 1899). ON THE PILLAR NEAR THE KAPPA-STAMBHA IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāma . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1526 Agunēṭi krōdhināma
saṁvatsara kā[¨r*]ttika śu 2 Ā hajarati mahamadu khulli kutubu pādaśahavoḍayalu
ṁgāri paṁppuna Aśvarāyaniṁgāru koppulavārikoṭhāmu vīragoṭhāmu
ya¨rraja¨rllalu sādhiṁcci mukuṁddabāhubaḷīṁdrunini sarahaddu
veḷadarimi kū¨rmmamu vacci kū¨rmmamu svāmiki vaiṣṇavuluku brāhmalaku sarvamā
nyamugā yīcci śihvādriki vacci pūrvamu śihvādrināthaniki narapati nityanivē
dyālu rāgabhōgalu sāgiṁccivuṁḍaṁgānu Ā madhya konnēṁḍlu khyilamaipōtēnu
Avenaka mukuṁdadēvumahārāju sāgiṁcenu yī venaka mari nalubhayiyēṁḍla
baṭṭi sāgakavuṁḍaṁgānu padmanāyakulu vippa¨rlagōtrulu rājādhirājamahā
rājarājaśrī kamaḷayaṁgāri vutṛlu sarvappa Aśvarāyaniṁgāru śihvādrinṛśihvu
ni nityanaivēdyālu tirupaḷikalu rāgabōgālaku krōdhināmasaṁvatsara mṛgaśirasālu
modalugānu naravagrāmamu Ā grāmamu phalavṛkṣālu tōṁṭalu polaṁ merakapallālu
ceruvulu grāmarokhkālusaitaṁ samastamunnu sarvamānyamugānu sama¨rppaṇacēsiri
svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphala
ṁ bhavēt [. 1*] [Ē]kaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāhyā dēva
dattā vasuṁdharā [. 2*]
Digital edition of SII 6.1184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
